job.title: Experienced QA Tester
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our QA team in Aix-en-Provence to ensure the quality of software deliveries. You design and execute test strategies, automate test scenarios, and contribute to continuous improvement.
mission.1: Définir la stratégie et les plans de tests
mission.2: Rédiger et exécuter les cas de tests fonctionnels et techniques
mission.4: Analyse anomalies and monitor their resolution
mission.5: Produire les rapports de tests et les métriques qualité
mission.7: Contribuer aux bonnes pratiques QA de l'équipe
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in informatique ou qualité
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in tests logiciels
profile.5: Certification ISTQB Foundation ou Advanced is a plus
